targets.rawSql: SELECT toString(timestamp) AS time, message FROM project_sos.service_events WHERE timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime AND category = 'Wave' AND level = 'INFO' ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 50

SELECT toStartOfMinute(timestamp) AS time, count() AS kills FROM project_sos.service_events WHERE timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime AND category = 'Combat' AND message LIKE 'Kills%' GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT toStartOfMinute(timestamp) AS time, multiIf(message LIKE 'Build%', 'Build', message LIKE 'Production%', 'Production', 'Other') AS event_type, count() AS count FROM project_sos.service_events WHERE timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime AND category = 'Economy' GROUP BY time, event_type ORDER BY time

SELECT toString(timestamp) AS time, world, message, network_id FROM project_sos.service_events WHERE timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime AND category = 'Network' ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 50

SELECT toStartOfMinute(timestamp) AS time, count() AS spawns FROM project_sos.service_events WHERE timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime AND category = 'Wave' AND level = 'DEBUG' GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT toStartOfMinute(timestamp) AS time, multiIf(message LIKE 'Enemy stuck%', 'Enemy Stuck', message LIKE 'Path failures%', 'Path Failures', message LIKE 'Build retry%', 'Build Retry', message LIKE 'Build giveup%', 'Build Giveup', 'Other') AS warning_type, count() AS count FROM project_sos.service_events WHERE timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime AND level = 'WARNING' GROUP BY time, warning_type ORDER BY time

SELECT toString(timestamp) AS time, message, network_id FROM project_sos.service_events WHERE timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime AND category = 'Combat' AND (message LIKE 'Hero died%' OR message LIKE 'GameOver%') ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 50
